findings.description: s4 is titled "作成手順" but its content belongs to the "Actionの作成" subsection (anchor: _makeActionClass). The source's "作成手順" is a parent section with no standalone text — it only contains subsections (Component作成, Action作成, View作成). Additionally, the content from "Actionの作成" is split non-contiguously: intro/processing-steps in s4, naming-convention in s5, then code in s6 — reversing the source order where naming convention (Actionのメソッド名命名方法) appears before action creation.
findings.source_evidence: Source structure: 作成手順 (---/--- section, no body text) → ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成 → ビジネスロジックを呼び出す処理(Action)の作成 → [Actionのメソッド名命名方法 (h3)] → [Actionの作成 (h3)]. The "Actionの作成" subsection contains the W11AC01Action class description, method signature, and 4 processing steps — all of which appear in s4.
